title: The Wrap-Up: What to Check One Last Time in an Empty Apartment Before Handing Over the Keys
excerpt: Empty apartment final checklist: before handing keys to landlord, move-out inspection, deposit protection, utilities, cleaning, Addis tenant handover guide.
content:
The wrap-up: what to check one last time in an empty apartment before handing over the keys

Truck gone, echo in rooms, and keys in hand—last walkthrough prevents deposit dispute and forgotten heirlooms in closet corner. Empty apartment checklist is ten-minute discipline separating clean break from callback embarrassment and landlord deduction letter.

This guide lists final checks before handing over keys after your move.

Room-by-room sweep

  • Closets and cabinets: Open every door—shelves, corners, top ledges.
  • Drawers: Pull out if removable—items hide in tracks.
  • Bathroom: Medicine cabinet, behind toilet, under sink.
  • Kitchen: Oven interior, range hood filter, fridge crisper if appliance stays.
  • Balcony and storage: Planters, locked cage, meter room.

Utilities and fixtures

Final meter photos electric water; switches off except required; water main if instructed. Light bulbs working or replace burned—some leases require. Faucets drip-free; toilet flush clean.

Cleaning standard

Sweep mop visible floors; wipe counters; remove tape residue walls. Professional clean receipt if contract demands—attach to handover email.

Damage documentation mutual

Compare move-in photos; note pre-existing unchanged; new damage repair now or disclose. Landlord sign handover form listing exceptions.

Keys and access

All keys remotes cards counted on form; mailbox key often forgotten—check. Gate clicker returned; parking pass surrendered.

Mail and address

Forward postal if service exists; notify bank employer. Remove name plate if personal.

Neighbors and compound

Inform guard you vacated; remove recycling cardboard pile from corridor—fine risk.

Digital sweep

Forget Wi-Fi reset if router yours; smart doorbell remove and patch holes per lease.

Emotional minute

Pause one room where life happened—then lock door forward not backward.

Active Movers completion

Confirm no company labels or stray materials—crew final walk mirrors yours.

Conclusion

Before keys handover: sweep every cavity, photo meters, clean to standard, document condition, return all access—wrap-up checklist protects deposit and closes chapter clean.
author: Active Movers Team
